description: The DesktopViewSettings component is used to adjust how viewing the local user's computer screen is done via the Dash Menu.

fields.FollowCursor: Whether the Desktop cursor should follow where the user's in game cursor is on the dash in real time.
fields.Brightness: How bright the display of the desktop is on the in game dash menu.
fields.Opacity: How transparent the in game view of the desktop is on the dash menu.

usage: Used in the dash desktop tab. Not used directly by the user.
